inputs.label: Driving Gear Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the driving (input) gear.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the driving (input) gear.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de dents de la roue menante (entrée).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de dientes del engranaje conductor (entrada).

inputs.label: Driven Gear Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the driven (output) gear.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the driven (output) gear.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de dents de la roue menée (sortie).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de dientes del engranaje conducido (salida).

inputs.label: Input Speed
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of the driving gear in revolutions per minute.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rotational speed of the driving gear in revolutions per minute.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik eden dişlinin dakikadaki devir cinsinden dönüş hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Drehzahl des treibenden Zahnrads in Umdrehungen pro Minute.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de rotation de la roue menante en tours par minute.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad de rotación del engranaje conductor en revoluciones por minuto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: السرعة الدورانية للترس المحرك بعدد الدورات في الدقيقة.

inputs.label: Input Torque
inputs.businessContext: Torque applied to the driving gear in Newton-meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Torque applied to the driving gear in Newton-meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tahrik eden dişliye uygulanan Newton-metre cinsinden tork.
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf das treibende Zahnrad wirkendes Drehmoment in Newtonmetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Couple appliqué à la roue menante en Newton-mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Par aplicado al engranaje conductor en Newton-metros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العزم المطبق على الترس المحرك بوحدة نيوتن-متر.

inputs.label: Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the gear pair in percentage (0-100). If not provided, assumes 100% (ideal).

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the gear pair in percentage (0-100). If not provided, assumes 100% (ideal).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişli çiftinin yüzde cinsinden verimi (0-100). Belirtilmezse %100 (ideal) varsayılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des Zahnradpaares in Prozent (0-100). Falls nicht angegeben, wird 100 % (ideal) angenommen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement de la paire d'engrenages en pourcentage (0-100). Si non fourni, suppose 100% (idéal).
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia del par de engranajes en porcentaje (0-100). Si no se proporciona, asume 100% (ideal).
businessContext_i18n.ar: كفاءة زوج التروس بالنسبة المئوية (0-100). إذا لم يتم توفيرها، يُفترض 100% (مثالية).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
